title: FurfSky DyeFix
description: Prevents Firmament and FurfSky Reborn from overriding Dyed ✿ items textures.
body:
FurfSky DyeFix is a small, simple mod preventing FurfSky Reborn's custom item textures from overriding SkyBlock dye cosmetics.

It works by checking item name / lore for the ✿ Symbol, and if found, it makes the item keep vanilla textures.

FurfSky DyeFix works fully automatic, not needing any further configuration upon adding, and applies globally, to everyones Armor, not just yours.
The Mod itself is client-side and lightweight, so it wont have an impact on your frames.
This Mod is deigned for Hypixel Skyblock players, that like custom textures, but also the cosmetics in the game itself, and dont just want to use one of them.

It is compatible with modern versions of Minecraft (1.21.1 and above) and requires fabric to work (aswell as FurfSky and Firmament, but thats self explanatory).

This project is not affiliated with Hypixel, Firmament or FurfSky Reborn.
